topic: A Mongolian horseman using an Uurga to catch a wild horse, wide landscape shot.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Wide landscape establishing shot of a lone Mongolian horseman readying an uurga on the steppe.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Side-angle as the horseman throws the uurga to loop a wild horse, dust rising.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Front view as the horseman tightens the uurga to secure the catch with the wild horse restrained.
parsed_generation.narration: On the wind-swept steppe, a Mongolian horseman readies the uurga. He throws and tightens the lasso to secure the wild horse.

feedback:
